description: Variant of 005: candidate said 'I'm not sure if I can answer that' on a connectivity probe after giving a partial main answer. This is meta-confession territory — Judge should push_back + meta_confession=true, not ack_no_experience.

judge_input.active_question_text: Using your primary iPaaS (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Boomi), how would you implement a near-real-time order sync from Salesforce to an on-prem ERP?
active_question_positive_evidence: Names specific platform components and connectors
Explains JSON/XML mapping with schema validation
Details reliability controls: retry with backoff, idempotency keys
active_question_red_flags: Tool-agnostic answer with no concrete platform components

active_question_rubric.excellent: Concrete iPaaS components, secure on-prem access, reliability controls.
active_question_rubric.meets_bar: Platform references and basic reliability controls.

judge_input.active_question_evaluation_hint: Verify platform-specific depth and reliability controls.

active_question_signal_metadata.value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

active_question_remaining_probes.1: What connectivity approach would you use to reach on-prem (e.g., agent/VPN/reverse proxy), and how would you secure it?
active_question_remaining_probes.2: How would you structure environments and promote changes safely?

5+ years hands-on production experience.signal_value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

recent_turns.text: What connectivity approach would you use to reach on-prem, and how would you secure it?
Hmm I'm not sure if I can answer that.

judge_input.candidate_utterance: Hmm I'm not sure if I can answer that.
